ResearchProjectDef.label: apothecary's miracle
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce apothecary's miracle and its mixture, a legendary elixir renowned for rapidly accelerating recovery and immunity.

ResearchProjectDef.label: battle elixir
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce battle elixir and its mixture, a potent concoction that significantly boosts combat abilities and psyfocus.

ResearchProjectDef.label: happy powder
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce happy powder and its mixture, a recreational substance that induces an intense euphoric high.

ResearchProjectDef.label: herbal extract
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce concentrated herbal essence extracted by grinding multiple raw herbs.

ResearchProjectDef.label: luhix
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce luhix and its mixture, a rare substance that enhances memory, learning capacity, and psyfocus.

ResearchProjectDef.label: vigor pill
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce vigor pills and their mixture, allowing users to work for extended periods without getting tired.

ResearchProjectDef.label: paregoric
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce paregoric and its mixture, a potent tincture for pain relief and increased healing.

ResearchProjectDef.label: potion of knowledge
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce potions of knowledge and their mixture, drawing forth knowledge to give the consumer greater ability at a skill.

ResearchProjectDef.label: stardust
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce stardust and its mixture, greatly enhancing memory, learning capacity, and slightly increasing psyfocus.
